description: The export boundary: genetic is excluded by default, included only under a specific, dated, written authorization re-checked at SEND time.

cases.name: a live written authorization includes genetic with its reference (AC-3)
an authorization valid at request but expired at SEND excludes genetic (EX-2)
a genetic-touching break-glass event classifies elevated-genetic (AC-8)
a non-genetic break-glass event stays standard severity
